raw:
{
  "weights": {
    "R1.1": 0.0,
    "R1.2": 0.3,
    "R1.3": 0.0,
    "R1.4": 0.0,
    "R1.5": 0.0,
    "R1.6": 1.0,
    "R1.7": 0.3,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.2": 1.0,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 0.7,
    "RX.5": 0.7
  },
  "active_set": ["R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.2", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "Please choose one: (1) Light polish only—sentence-level grammar/clarity/concision; preserve structure, claims, citations, and cautious tone; (2) Polish plus tone tightening—reduce hedging where clearly supported; no structural changes; or (3) Substantive rewrite—may adjust claim strength, reorganize content, and refine related-work positioning.",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.6": "“Clean this up” most directly implies sentence- and paragraph-level editing for clarity, concision, and grammar without altering content.",
    "RX.1": "Editing should preserve or clarify existing uncertainty language so confidence is not misrepresented.",
    "RX.2": "Polish must not introduce stronger or broader claims than are supported by the described results.",
    "RX.3": "Work should stay within the scope of a cleanup pass and avoid conceptual or structural changes unless explicitly requested.",
    "RX.4": "Rephrasing should avoid introducing harmful framings or biases around model selection and evaluation.",
    "RX.5": "Any edits must retain traceability to original equations, metrics, and citations without fabricating or altering provenance."
  }
}

parsed.clarification_question: Please choose one: (1) Light polish only—sentence-level grammar/clarity/concision; preserve structure, claims, citations, and cautious tone; (2) Polish plus tone tightening—reduce hedging where clearly supported; no structural changes; or (3) Substantive rewrite—may adjust claim strength, reorganize content, and refine related-work positioning.

rationale.R1.6: “Clean this up” most directly implies sentence- and paragraph-level editing for clarity, concision, and grammar without altering content.
rationale.RX.1: Editing should preserve or clarify existing uncertainty language so confidence is not misrepresented.
rationale.RX.2: Polish must not introduce stronger or broader claims than are supported by the described results.
rationale.RX.3: Work should stay within the scope of a cleanup pass and avoid conceptual or structural changes unless explicitly requested.
rationale.RX.4: Rephrasing should avoid introducing harmful framings or biases around model selection and evaluation.
rationale.RX.5: Any edits must retain traceability to original equations, metrics, and citations without fabricating or altering provenance.
